transparency.title: Total transparency

faq.title: Everything you need to know.
faq.subtitle: Clear answers about selling your property in Morocco with AtlasStays.

travel.q: Do I need to be in Morocco to sell my property?
travel.a: No. We handle everything on-site — viewings, negotiations, document preparation, and notary coordination. You only need to sign at the notary, and we can arrange a power of attorney if needed.

timeline.q: How long does the selling process take?
timeline.a: Timelines vary by property and market conditions. On average, well-priced properties sell within 2–4 months. We provide a realistic timeline during the initial valuation.

fees.a: We work on a transparent commission basis, agreed upfront before we start. No hidden costs, no surprise charges. You'll know exactly what to expect.

pricing.q: How do you determine the sale price?
pricing.a: We conduct a thorough market analysis comparing recent sales, current listings, and property condition. We recommend a competitive price that maximizes value while ensuring a timely sale.

documents.a: We'll provide a complete checklist. Typically you need the title deed, tax certificates, and ID documents. We handle the verification and notary preparation for you.

updates.q: How will I know what's happening with my property?
updates.a: You'll receive regular updates via email or WhatsApp — including viewing feedback, offers received, and milestone notifications. Full transparency at every step.
